__fixture__.name: ai_evidence_presented_then_superseded
__fixture__.scenario: An AI apply path first surfaces a suggestion under ai_assisted provenance at low_confidence_disclosed. A follow-up observation revises the evidence to a higher-confidence row; the second row supersedes the first. Both rows remain reachable by id. A narrative_summary_card_record of provenance_badge_class = ai_generated_summary cites both history_row_ids with medium_confidence_disclosed, preserving the underlying evidence rather than replacing them. Importance is consequential, so the card carries a non-truncating durable detail_link to a full_detail_sheet.

summary_title: AI evidence revised after closer look
